modules/cache/mod_cache.h
1/* Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
2 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
3 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
4 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
5 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
6 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
7 *
8 *     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
9 *
10 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14 * limitations under the License.
15 */
16
17/**
18 * @file mod_cache.h
19 * @brief Main include file for the Apache Transparent Cache
20 *
21 * @defgroup MOD_CACHE mod_cache
22 * @ingroup  APACHE_MODS
23 * @{
24 */ view japanese
25
26#ifndef MOD_CACHE_H
27#define MOD_CACHE_H
28
29#include "httpd.h"
30#include "apr_date.h"
31#include "apr_optional.h"
32#include "apr_hooks.h"
33
34#include "cache_common.h"
35
36/* Create a set of CACHE_DECLARE(type), CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type) and
37 * CACHE_DECLARE_DATA with appropriate export and import tags for the platform
38 */ view japanese
39#if !defined(WIN32)
40#define CACHE_DECLARE(type)            type
41#define CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type)     type
42#define CACHE_DECLARE_DATA
43#elif defined(CACHE_DECLARE_STATIC)
44#define CACHE_DECLARE(type)            type __stdcall
45#define CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type)     type
46#define CACHE_DECLARE_DATA
47#elif defined(CACHE_DECLARE_EXPORT)
48#define CACHE_DECLARE(type)            __declspec(dllexport) type __stdcall
49#define CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type)     __declspec(dllexport) type
50#define CACHE_DECLARE_DATA             __declspec(dllexport)
51#else
52#define CACHE_DECLARE(type)            __declspec(dllimport) type __stdcall
53#define CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type)     __declspec(dllimport) type
54#define CACHE_DECLARE_DATA             __declspec(dllimport)
55#endif
56
57/* cache info information */ view japanese
58typedef struct cache_info cache_info;
59struct cache_info {
60    /**
61     * the original time corresponding to the 'Date:' header of the request
62     * served
63     */ view japanese
64    apr_time_t date;
65    /** a time when the cached entity is due to expire */ view japanese
66    apr_time_t expire;
67    /** r->request_time from the same request */ view japanese
68    apr_time_t request_time;
69    /** apr_time_now() at the time the entity was actually cached */ view japanese
70    apr_time_t response_time;
71    /**
72     * HTTP status code of the cached entity. Though not necessarily the
73     * status code finally issued to the request.
74     */ view japanese
75    int status;
76    /* cached cache-control */ view japanese
77    cache_control_t control;
78};
79
80/* cache handle information */ view japanese
81typedef struct cache_object cache_object_t;
82struct cache_object {
83    const char *key;
84    cache_object_t *next;
85    cache_info info;
86    /* Opaque portion (specific to the implementation) of the cache object */ view japanese
87    void *vobj;
88};
89
90typedef struct cache_handle cache_handle_t;
91struct cache_handle {
92    cache_object_t *cache_obj;
93    apr_table_t *req_hdrs;        /* cached request headers */ view japanese
94    apr_table_t *resp_hdrs;       /* cached response headers */ view japanese
95};
96
97#define CACHE_PROVIDER_GROUP "cache"
98
99typedef struct {
100    int (*remove_entity) (cache_handle_t *h);
101    apr_status_t (*store_headers)(cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r, cache_info *i);
102    apr_status_t (*store_body)(cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r, apr_bucket_brigade *in,
103                           apr_bucket_brigade *out);
104    apr_status_t (*recall_headers) (cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r);
105    apr_status_t (*recall_body) (cache_handle_t *h, apr_pool_t *p, apr_bucket_brigade *bb);
106    int (*create_entity) (cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r,
107                           const char *urlkey, apr_off_t len, apr_bucket_brigade *bb);
108    int (*open_entity) (cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r,
109                           const char *urlkey);
110    int (*remove_url) (cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r);
111    apr_status_t (*commit_entity)(cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r);
112    apr_status_t (*invalidate_entity)(cache_handle_t *h, request_rec *r);
113} cache_provider;
114
115typedef enum {
116    AP_CACHE_HIT,
117    AP_CACHE_REVALIDATE,
118    AP_CACHE_MISS,
119    AP_CACHE_INVALIDATE
120} ap_cache_status_e;
121
122#define AP_CACHE_HIT_ENV "cache-hit"
123#define AP_CACHE_REVALIDATE_ENV "cache-revalidate"
124#define AP_CACHE_MISS_ENV "cache-miss"
125#define AP_CACHE_INVALIDATE_ENV "cache-invalidate"
126#define AP_CACHE_STATUS_ENV "cache-status"
127
128
129/* cache_util.c */ view japanese
130/* do a HTTP/1.1 age calculation */ view japanese
131CACHE_DECLARE(apr_time_t) ap_cache_current_age(cache_info *info, const apr_time_t age_value,
132                                               apr_time_t now);
133
134CACHE_DECLARE(apr_time_t) ap_cache_hex2usec(const char *x);
135CACHE_DECLARE(void) ap_cache_usec2hex(apr_time_t j, char *y);
136CACHE_DECLARE(char *) ap_cache_generate_name(apr_pool_t *p, int dirlevels,
137                                             int dirlength,
138                                             const char *name);
139CACHE_DECLARE(const char *)ap_cache_tokstr(apr_pool_t *p, const char *list, const char **str);
140
141/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an
142 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache.
143 */ view japanese
144CACHE_DECLARE(apr_table_t *)ap_cache_cacheable_headers(apr_pool_t *pool,
145                                                        apr_table_t *t,
146                                                        server_rec *s);
147
148/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an input
149 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache.
150 */ view japanese
151CACHE_DECLARE(apr_table_t *)ap_cache_cacheable_headers_in(request_rec *r);
152
153/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an output
154 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache;
155 * ensure there is a content type and capture any errors.
156 */ view japanese
157CACHE_DECLARE(apr_table_t *)ap_cache_cacheable_headers_out(request_rec *r);
158
159/**
160 * Parse the Cache-Control and Pragma headers in one go, marking
161 * which tokens appear within the header. Populate the structure
162 * passed in.
163 */ view japanese
164int ap_cache_control(request_rec *r, cache_control_t *cc, const char *cc_header,
165        const char *pragma_header, apr_table_t *headers);
166
167
168/* hooks */ view japanese
169
170/**
171 * Cache status hook.
172 * This hook is called as soon as the cache has made a decision as to whether
173 * an entity should be served from cache (hit), should be served from cache
174 * after a successful validation (revalidate), or served from the backend
175 * and potentially cached (miss).
176 *
177 * A basic implementation of this hook exists in mod_cache which writes this
178 * information to the subprocess environment, and optionally to request
179 * headers. Further implementations may add hooks as appropriate to perform
180 * more advanced processing, or to store statistics about the cache behaviour.
181 */ view japanese
182APR_DECLARE_EXTERNAL_HOOK(cache, CACHE, int, cache_status, (cache_handle_t *h,
183                request_rec *r, apr_table_t *headers, ap_cache_status_e status,
184                const char *reason))
185
186APR_DECLARE_OPTIONAL_FN(apr_status_t,
187                        ap_cache_generate_key,
188                        (request_rec *r, apr_pool_t*p, const char **key));
189
190
191#endif /*MOD_CACHE_H*/ view japanese
192/** @} */ view japanese

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:17-24

/**
 * @file mod_cache.h
 * @brief Apache Transparent Cache のメインインクルードファイル
 *
 * @defgroup MOD_CACHE mod_cache
 * @ingroup  APACHE_MODS
 * @{
 */

Original comment

/**
 * @file mod_cache.h
 * @brief Main include file for the Apache Transparent Cache
 *
 * @defgroup MOD_CACHE mod_cache
 * @ingroup  APACHE_MODS
 * @{
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:36-38

/* プラットフォームに適したエクスポートおよびインポートタグを使用して、
 * CACHE_DECLARE(type)、CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type)、および CACHE_DECLARE_DATA のセットを作成する
 */

Original comment

/* Create a set of CACHE_DECLARE(type), CACHE_DECLARE_NONSTD(type) and
 * CACHE_DECLARE_DATA with appropriate export and import tags for the platform
 */

/* キャッシュ情報 */

Original comment

/**
     * リクエストの 'Date:' ヘッダーに対応する元の時刻
     */

Original comment

/**
     * the original time corresponding to the 'Date:' header of the request
     * served
     */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:65

Original comment

/** a time when the cached entity is due to expire */

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:67

/** 同じリクエストからの r->request_time */

Original comment

/** r->request_time from the same request */

Japanese translation

/** エンティティが実際にキャッシュされた時点の apr_time_now() */

Original comment

/** apr_time_now() at the time the entity was actually cached */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:71-74

/**
     * キャッシュされたエンティティのHTTPステータスコード。ただし、リクエストに対して最終的に発行されるステータスコードとは必ずしも一致しません。
     */

Original comment

/**
     * HTTP status code of the cached entity. Though not necessarily the
     * status code finally issued to the request.
     */

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:130

/* HTTP/1.1 の age 計算を行う */

Original comment

/* do a HTTP/1.1 age calculation */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:141-143

/* キャッシュへの保存が許可されているヘッダーテーブルの要素から、
 * 新しいテーブルを作成する。
 */

Original comment

/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an
 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:148-150

/* 入力ヘッダーテーブルのうち、キャッシュへの保存が許可されている要素からなる新しいテーブルを作成する。 */

Original comment

/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an input
 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:153-156

/* キャッシュへの保存が許可されている出力ヘッダーテーブルの要素から構成される新しいテーブルを作成します。
 * コンテンツタイプが存在することを確認し、エラーがあればキャプチャします。
 */

Original comment

/* Create a new table consisting of those elements from an output
 * headers table that are allowed to be stored in a cache;
 * ensure there is a content type and capture any errors.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:159-163

/**
 * Cache-Control ヘッダーと Pragma ヘッダーを一度に解析し、
 * どのトークンがヘッダー内に存在するかをマークします。
 * 渡された構造体に値を設定します。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Parse the Cache-Control and Pragma headers in one go, marking
 * which tokens appear within the header. Populate the structure
 * passed in.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:168

/* フック */

Original comment

/* hooks */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:170-181

/**
 * キャッシュステータスフック。
 * このフックは、エンティティをキャッシュから提供すべきか（hit）、検証成功後にキャッシュから提供すべきか（revalidate）、あるいはバックエンドから提供して必要に応じてキャッシュすべきか（miss）というキャッシュの判断が下された直後に呼び出されます。
 *
 * このフックの基本的な実装は mod_cache に存在し、この情報をサブプロセス環境変数に書き込み、オプションでリクエストヘッダーにも書き込みます。その他の実装では、より高度な処理を実行したり、キャッシュの動作に関する統計を保存したりするために、必要に応じてフックを追加することができます。
 */

Original comment

/**
 * Cache status hook.
 * This hook is called as soon as the cache has made a decision as to whether
 * an entity should be served from cache (hit), should be served from cache
 * after a successful validation (revalidate), or served from the backend
 * and potentially cached (miss).
 *
 * A basic implementation of this hook exists in mod_cache which writes this
 * information to the subprocess environment, and optionally to request
 * headers. Further implementations may add hooks as appropriate to perform
 * more advanced processing, or to store statistics about the cache behaviour.
 */

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:191

/*MOD_CACHE_H*/

Original comment

/*MOD_CACHE_H*/

Japanese translation

modules/cache/mod_cache.h:192

/** @} */

Original comment

/** @} */
